name: alex-harness
description: Personal SDLC agent harness — helix entry point + A1-A8 business elements + governance layer (session-reporter, mode-router, context-curator, evolution-tracker, knowledge-curator).
author: Alex-nx-netizen

plugins.name: helix
plugins.description: Unified harness entry point. /helix = full SDLC execution authority. Orchestrates all A1-A8 elements automatically.

plugins.name: a1-task-understander
plugins.description: Parses user intent into structured TaskCard (type, scope, done criteria, risk signals).

plugins.name: a2-repo-sensor
plugins.description: Scans repo structure, tech stack, recent commits, dirty files → RepoContext JSON.

plugins.name: a3-retriever
plugins.description: Keyword + semantic code search within repo → SearchResult[].

plugins.name: a4-planner
plugins.description: Generates 2-3 implementation plan options with trade-offs, recommends best path.

plugins.name: a5-executor
plugins.description: Executes PlanDoc file-by-file, enforces minimal changes, auto-invokes A8 for destructive ops.

plugins.name: a6-validator
plugins.description: Auto-detects project type, runs tests/lint/typecheck → ValidationReport.

plugins.name: a7-explainer
plugins.description: Generates commit messages, PR descriptions, and why-only code comments.

plugins.name: a8-risk-guard
plugins.description: Mandatory risk assessment before destructive/irreversible operations. Cannot be bypassed.

plugins.name: session-reporter
plugins.description: Auto-pushes session completion log to Feishu Base on Stop hook.

plugins.name: mode-router
plugins.description: Analyzes task signals → recommends solo / solo+tools / team routing.

plugins.name: context-curator
plugins.description: Session-start context compression — loads _meta/ + memory + skills in 5 seconds.

plugins.name: evolution-tracker
plugins.description: Reads runs.jsonl → L2 retrospective → improvement proposals.

plugins.name: knowledge-curator
plugins.description: Organizes Feishu docs / web pages / notes → structured Feishu wiki pages.
